prestazioni: Upgrade the 4A92T (1.5L MIVEC Turbo) engine with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, paired with a custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system featuring a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust tip and a GReddy Revolution RS front-mount intercooler (FMIC) for optimized airflow and reduced intake temperatures.

Install a Haltech Elite 1500 standalone ECU with a custom-tuned map for E85 fuel, incorporating a Bosch 0280158001 3.5-bar MAP sensor and a K&N high-flow panel filter (Part #33-2071) for improved throttle response and power delivery up to 280 HP at 6,500 RPM.

Replace the stock suspension with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Part #DFV 001), paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (5x114.3, 15mm) and a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) to enhance cornering stability and reduce body roll during aggressive driving.
estetica: Install a Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Part #RB-COLT-CZT) with custom carbon fiber front canards and a rear diffuser, complemented by a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Part #CF-MCCZT-HOOD) for weight reduction and aggressive aerodynamics.
Equip the car with Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (17x8 +35 ET, 5x114.3 PCD) in Hyper Silver, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (215/40 R17) for maximum grip and a track-ready stance.

Apply a full 3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap with custom red pinstriping, paired with a JDM-spec Mitsubishi front lip (Part #MZ310011) and a Cusco rear strut bar (Part #666 540 A) for a cohesive, race-inspired aesthetic.
